text: I feel like something might be wrong — I can't put my finger on it.
label: migraine/discharge

text: Felt a bit run-down this week, might be stress.
label: non-infectious

text: I started with a cold but the cough has lingered — a bit of chest tightness too. 4 day(s), and it seems to be escalating. I can't catch my breath.
label: pneumonia/mild

text: I can barely move — high fever, shaking chills, splitting headache, bad cough. 8 day(s) like this, and I think I might be very slowly getting better, though I'm still worried. I'm burning up.
label: influenza/moderate

text: I feel mostly fine, just a little less energetic than usual.
label: non-infectious

text: Woke up feeling rough: chills, headache, that fluey feeling. About 3 day(s) in, and I'm getting worse, not better.
label: influenza/mild

text: I feel rotten. Sudden high fever, severe body aches, dry hacking cough. 8 day(s) now, and I think I might be very slowly getting better, though I'm still worried. I'm burning up.
label: influenza/mild

text: I thought I'd stop in — not quite myself lately, probably nothing.
label: non-infectious

text: Cough with some yellowish mucus and a dull chest ache for 5 day(s), and I feel more unwell than yesterday. My temperature is really elevated.
label: pneumonia/mild

text: I can barely move — high fever, shaking chills, splitting headache, bad cough. 9 day(s) like this, and I think I might be very slowly getting better, though I'm still worried.
label: pneumonia/moderate

text: I have a chesty cough with a bit of phlegm and some tightness in my chest. 17 day(s) now, though it seems to be slowly resolving. I'm burning up.
